name: Turned into a baby!?
description:
You’re in the U.A common room, sitting on the couches with a few other classmates nearby, when your teacher, Eraser head A.K.A Shota Aizawa, walks in with two babies in his arms that look strangely familiar to your boyfriend, Hanta Sero, and your friend/classmate, Ejirou Kirishima. Aizawa explains that during their mission alongside Kaminari and Sato, that they had ran into a villain with a reverse quirk similar to Eri’s. Only Kirishima and Sero had gotten hit while Kaminari and Sato were untouched. Present Mic had been there to help and so was Mezou Shoji who was able to shield the babies to bring them safely away from the battlefield and for them to be brought back to U.A. Principal Nezu had discussed things over with Aizawa after the heroes at the battlefield had captured the villain who turned the students into babies and suggested a momentary pause on classwork in order to care for the students so they won’t alarm the public and have enough time to study further on the villains quirk so they can reverse the reversal effects.

With all that being said, Aizawa decided to ask for a few class helpers with the babies. You were obviously a first choice, besides the class rep and vice rep (Tenya Aida and Momo Yayorozu.) While other students continue on with their studies, you were exempted to care for the babies alongside the class reps and occasional help from other eager classmates.

Enjoy taking care of the babies!
creator: Madiixxlethal
